metadata.description: Local plugin marketplace for CLI-Anything and Deep Scavenger Intel MCP tools.

plugins.name: cli-anything
plugins.description: Build powerful, stateful CLI interfaces for any GUI application using the cli-anything harness methodology.

plugins.name: deep-scavenger-intel-tools
plugins.description: Read-only MCP wrapper for Deep Scavenger intel surfaces, exposing intel-health, intel-ops-overview, and intel-briefing over stdio.
